heading: Renewable fuels
label: 8630 Renewable fuels
text: In providing assistance pursuant to this subchapter, a State, or any other person with which the State makes arrangements to carry out the purposes of this subchapter, may purchase renewable fuels, including biomass.
notes: Report to Congress, , , provided that:Pub. L. 109–58, title I, § 121(c)119 Stat. 616Aug. 8, 2005“The Secretary [of Energy] shall report to Congress on the use of renewable fuels in providing assistance under the Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Act of 1981 ( et seq.).”42 U.S.C. 8621
